Create

Contact support

Email

For general questions or feedback, email us at support@slash.fun. We reply within 24 hours.

Discord

Join our Discord community to talk with other creators and get real-time support.

FAQ

Visit the FAQ page for the most common questions and solutions.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

What does it cost to create a token?

Creating a token on slash.fun only requires paying gas fees on Base. We do not charge launch fees or any hidden commissions.

What happens to the token liquidity?

Liquidity is created automatically on Uniswap-Base and locked to protect creators and investors. The creator keeps 5% of the supply and receives 66% of LP fees, as described on Basecamp.

Can I add images or video clips?

Yes! You can add an image or video to your token. We accept images (.jpg, .png, .gif) up to 15 MB and videos (.mp4) up to 30 MB. The recommended minimum resolution is 1000x1000 px for images and 1080p for video.

Create a new token

Images: max 15 MB (.jpg, .gif, .png recommended). Video: max 30 MB (.mp4 recommended).
Resolution: minimum 1000x1000 px for images; 1080p (16:9 or 9:16) for videos.
